title: Neue Welt SMP (BetterVanilla)
description: A modpack with many vanilla optimizations.
body:
![Neue Welt Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/743553165b8ab4d1d63e95e1b69ae6b61c993ac0.png)

# 🌍 Neue Welt SMP Modpack  
**A Lightweight Experience for Vanilla Lovers**

Are you a fan of the vanilla Minecraft experience but still want some quality-of-life improvements? The **Neue Welt SMP Modpack** is built just for you! Inspired by streamlined modpacks like [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) , this pack enhances performance and usability without compromising the cozy charm of vanilla Minecraft 🍃.

---

## 🤝 Designed for SMP Servers

Originally created for a private **Survival Multiplayer (SMP)** server, this modpack includes carefully selected mods tailored for a fun, collaborative, and immersive server environment. You’ll find features like:

🎙️ **Integrated Voice Chat** – Talk with your friends right in-game, no extra software needed!  
⚡ **Performance Tweaks** – Enjoy smoother gameplay and faster load times, even on modest systems.  
🧰 **Convenience Mods** – Subtle quality-of-life enhancements like better HUDs, mini-maps, and usability upgrades that keep the vanilla spirit alive.

---

While the modpack is primarily built for our private SMP community, you're more than welcome to enjoy it yourself! 🌟 Whether you're hosting a server for friends or just want a polished solo experience, the **Neue Welt SMP Modpack** offers a smooth, fun, and familiar journey through Minecraft.

🔄 We aim to keep the modpack updated with each major Minecraft version, maintaining the same curated selection of mods so you can keep playing — without hassle or compromise!
